历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 13694 → 15143 → 15149 → 26214 → 22537 respectively. In 2024, due to the splitting of major groups (re-selection of Chemistry/No Restriction), the ranking jumped significantly to 26214, then fell back to 22537 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 22537. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 57 → 63 → 61 → 69 → 75, showing continuous expansion. In 2026, the plan is 103 students, an increase of 28 students compared to 2025, a growth of about 37.3%, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it ranks 101st, with a slight decline in recent years, but it remains among the top 100 comprehensive universities in China. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics and conduct, with generally negative evaluations. From 2024 to 2025, there were no significant reputation events. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 84th, with an evaluation of 'average', and a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, without high attention. There is no record of enrollment gaps for Anhui University in the abnormal enrollment files. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University has no disciplines rated A- or above, and its engineering fields such as computer science and electronic information are at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Anhui University is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, in the central region. In 2025, the Physics Category plan of 75 students accounts for about 67.6% of the university's total plan in Hunan, making it the main enrollment category. The scale of enrollment from other provinces is medium to large, with no significant regional preference signals. Majors corresponding to Physics Category, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, are highly recommended due to social popularity, and the overall popularity of engineering majors continues to heat up. The number of Physics Category candidates in this province was 320,192 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, indicating moderate intensification of competition, with a slight decrease in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core advantage of a significant expansion of about 37.3% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the increase of about 8.4% in local Physics Category candidates partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the continued heating up of engineering major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27385, with a range of 26885–27885.
